── DELL OS10 (PowerSwitch S/Z series) ──────────────────────────────────────

Sintaxe similar ao Cisco NX-OS. NÃO inclua configure/end.

VLAN:
  ["interface vlan <VLAN_ID>",
   "description <NOME_VLAN>",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

Interface acesso:
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/1",
   "no shutdown",
   "switchport mode access",
   "switchport access vlan <VLAN_ID>",
   "spanning-tree port type edge",
   "spanning-tree bpduguard enable",
   "exit"]

Interface trunk (uplink):
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/2",
   "no shutdown",
   "switchport mode trunk",
   "switchport trunk allowed-vlan <VLAN_A>,<VLAN_B>",
   "exit"]

Desativar porta:
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/3", "shutdown", "exit"]

Reativar porta:
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/3", "no shutdown", "exit"]

Interface L3 VLAN (SVI):
  ["interface vlan <VLAN_ID>",
   "ip address 192.168.100.1/24",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

DHCP relay:
  ["interface vlan <VLAN_ID>",
   "ip helper-address 10.0.0.1",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit"]

Rota estática:
  ["ip route 10.10.10.0/24 192.168.1.254"]

Rota padrão:
  ["ip route 0.0.0.0/0 192.168.1.254"]

VLAN (operações adicionais):
  Renomear VLAN (mudar description):
    ["interface vlan 100", "description NOVO-NOME", "exit"]
  Deletar VLAN:
    ["no interface vlan 100"]
  Múltiplas VLANs:
    ["interface vlan 100", "description GERENCIA", "no shutdown", "exit",
     "interface vlan 200", "description CFTV", "no shutdown", "exit"]

Interface acesso completa (com descrição e storm-control):
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/1",
   "description WORKSTATION-01",
   "no shutdown",
   "switchport mode access",
   "switchport access vlan 100",
   "spanning-tree port type edge",
   "spanning-tree bpduguard enable",
   "storm-control broadcast pps 1000",
   "storm-control multicast pps 1000",
   "exit"]

Interface trunk completa:
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/48",
   "description UPLINK-CORE",
   "no shutdown",
   "switchport mode trunk",
   "switchport trunk allowed-vlan 10,20,30,100,200",
   "spanning-tree port type network",
   "exit"]

Adicionar VLAN a trunk existente:
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/48", "switchport trunk allowed-vlan add 300", "exit"]

Remover VLAN de trunk existente:
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/48", "switchport trunk allowed-vlan remove 300", "exit"]

Speed e duplex:
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/1", "speed 1000", "duplex full", "exit"]
  ["interface ethernet 1/1/1", "autoneg on", "exit"]

Port-channel / LAG:
  ["interface port-channel 1",
   "no shutdown",
   "exit",
   "interface ethernet 1/1/1",
   "channel-group 1 mode active",
   "exit",
   "interface ethernet 1/1/2",
   "channel-group 1 mode active",
   "exit"]

STP/RSTP — parâmetros globais:
  Ativar/desativar:
    ["spanning-tree enable"]
    ["no spanning-tree enable"]

  Modo de operação:
    ["spanning-tree mode rstp"]       ← recomendado
    ["spanning-tree mode mstp"]
    ["spanning-tree mode stp"]        ← STP clássico (802.1D)

  Priority da bridge (múltiplos de 4096; padrão=32768; menor=root):
    ["spanning-tree priority 4096"]   ← para forçar root
    ["spanning-tree priority 8192"]
    ["spanning-tree priority 32768"]  ← padrão
    ["spanning-tree priority 61440"]  ← para nunca ser root

  Timers globais (alterar apenas se necessário — podem causar instabilidade):
    ["spanning-tree hello-time 2"]          ← padrão: 2s (1-10)
    ["spanning-tree forward-time 15"]       ← padrão: 15s (4-30)
    ["spanning-tree max-age 20"]            ← padrão: 20s (6-40)
    ["spanning-tree transmit hold-count 6"] ← padrão: 6 BPDUs/s (1-10)

  Proteções globais:
    ["spanning-tree bpduguard default"]   ← BPDU guard em todas as edge ports
    ["spanning-tree loopguard default"]   ← loop guard em todas as portas normais

STP/RSTP — por porta (dentro do bloco de interface):
  Tipo de porta:
    "spanning-tree port type edge"          ← portfast: host/server/AP
    "spanning-tree port type normal"        ← porta normal (padrão)
    "spanning-tree port type network"       ← uplink para outro switch (bridge assurance)
    "no spanning-tree port type edge"       ← remover edge

  Proteções por porta:
    "spanning-tree bpduguard enable"        ← bloqueia porta se receber BPDU
    "no spanning-tree bpduguard enable"
    "spanning-tree bpdufilter enable"       ← não envia/recebe BPDUs (usar com cuidado)
    "no spanning-tree bpdufilter enable"
    "spanning-tree guard root"              ← impede a porta de se tornar root port
    "no spanning-tree guard root"
    "spanning-tree guard loop"              ← loop guard individual por porta
    "no spanning-tree guard loop"

  Custo e prioridade de porta (ajuste fino de topologia):
    "spanning-tree cost 20000"              ← custo da porta (1-200000000; menor=preferido)
    "spanning-tree port-priority 128"       ← prioridade (múltiplos de 16; padrão=128; menor=preferido)
    "spanning-tree link-type point-to-point" ← força modo ponto-a-ponto (rápida transição)
    "spanning-tree link-type shared"        ← modo compartilhado (hubs/meios half-duplex)

STP/RSTP — MSTP (quando mode=mstp):
  Configuração da região MST:
    ["spanning-tree mst configuration",
     "name NOME_REGIAO",
     "revision 1",
     "instance 1 vlan 10,20,30",
     "instance 2 vlan 40,50",
     "exit"]

  Priority por instância MST:
    ["spanning-tree mst 1 priority 4096"]
    ["spanning-tree mst 0 priority 32768"]   ← instância 0 = IST (todas as VLANs não mapeadas)

  Por porta — custo/prioridade MST:
    "spanning-tree mst 1 cost 20000"
    "spanning-tree mst 1 port-priority 128"

STP — show commands (diagnóstico):
  "show spanning-tree"                        ← resumo geral
  "show spanning-tree summary"                ← contagem de TCNs e estado por modo
  "show spanning-tree detail"                 ← timers, root, portas com estado
  "show spanning-tree interface ethernet 1/1/1" ← estado STP de porta específica
  "show spanning-tree mst"                    ← estado MSTP
  "show spanning-tree mst configuration"      ← configuração da região MST
  "show spanning-tree mst 1"                  ← instância MST específica

REGRAS IMPORTANTES PARA DELL OS10:
- Interface naming: ethernet 1/1/X (slot/sub-slot/porta) ou ethernet 1/1/X:Y (breakout)
- SVI criada com "interface vlan N" (diferente do NX-OS que usa "interface Vlan N")
- BPDU guard e edge port se aplicam por porta (mais granular que global)
- NÃO usar: show platform cpu-traffic (Cisco), show environment temperature sem verificar suporte,
  show system resources (NX-OS), show tech-support (timeout), debug qualquer coisa

── LIST_VLANS (dell): ssh_show_commands: ["show vlan"]

── LIST_PORTS (dell):
  Geral:            ssh_show_commands: ["show interface status"]
  Porta específica: ssh_show_commands: ["show interface ethernet 1/1/1", "show running-config interface ethernet 1/1/1"]
  Combinado:        ssh_show_commands: ["show vlan", "show interface status"]

── GET_INFO exemplos (dell) — comando específico do usuário:
  ssh_show_commands: ["show running-config"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show ip interface brief"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show version"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show mac address-table"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show arp"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show spanning-tree"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show lldp neighbors"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show ip route"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show logging"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show processes cpu"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show memory summary"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show interface counters"]

── GET_INFO DIAGNÓSTICO (dell OS10) — usuário descreve um PROBLEMA ─────────────

CPU alta / processos travados / switch lento:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show processes cpu", "show processes node-id 1",
    "show memory summary", "show spanning-tree summary",
    "show mac address-table count", "show ip arp summary",
    "show interface status", "show version"
  ]

Spanning-tree / instabilidade / flapping / TCN:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show spanning-tree summary", "show spanning-tree detail",
    "show mac address-table count", "show interface status",
    "show lldp neighbors", "show vlan", "show version"
  ]

Interfaces caindo / erros de link / port-flap:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show interface status", "show interface summary",
    "show spanning-tree summary", "show lldp neighbors",
    "show mac address-table count", "show vlan", "show version"
  ]

Lentidão de rede / tráfego lento / problemas de roteamento:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show interface status", "show processes cpu",
    "show memory summary", "show spanning-tree summary",
    "show mac address-table count", "show ip route summary",
    "show ip arp summary", "show version"
  ]

Diagnóstico geral / verificação completa de estado:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show version", "show processes cpu", "show memory summary",
    "show interface status", "show spanning-tree summary",
    "show mac address-table count", "show ip route summary",
    "show vlan", "show lldp neighbors"
  ]

Erros / logs do sistema / eventos recentes:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show logging", "show logging onebox",
    "show interface status", "show processes cpu",
    "show memory summary", "show spanning-tree summary", "show version"
  ]

Erros de interface / contadores de erro:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show interface status", "show interface summary",
    "show interface counters",
    "show spanning-tree summary", "show lldp neighbors", "show version"
  ]

VLT (Virtual Link Trunking) / problemas de LAG:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show vlt statistics", "show vlt status",
    "show interface port-channel summary",
    "show interface status", "show spanning-tree summary",
    "show mac address-table count", "show version"
  ]

SNMP / alto consumo de processos específicos:
  ssh_show_commands: [
    "show processes cpu", "show processes node-id 1",
    "show memory summary", "show logging",
    "show version"
  ]

── SISTEMA (dell OS10):
  Hostname:    ["hostname SW-NOME"]
  Banner:      ["banner login \"Acesso Restrito. Monitorado e sujeito a sanções.\""]
  Syslog:      ["logging server 10.0.0.1"]
  Remover:     ["no logging server 10.0.0.1"]
  Timezone:    ["clock timezone BRT -3 0"]
  Desabilitar Telnet: ["no telnet server enable"]

── NTP (dell OS10):
  ["ntp server 10.0.0.1 prefer",
   "ntp server 10.0.0.2"]
  Remover NTP:  ["no ntp server 10.0.0.1"]

── SNMP (dell OS10):
  Community RO: ["snmp-server community PUBLIC ro"]
  Community com restrição de host:
    ["snmp-server community PUBLIC ro ipaddress 10.0.0.70 ipmask 255.255.255.255"]
  Localização e contato:
    ["snmp-server location DATACENTER-NOME",
     "snmp-server contact admin@empresa.com"]
  Trap host v2c: ["snmp-server host 10.0.0.70 traps version 2c PUBLIC"]
  Desabilitar traps desnecessários:
    ["no snmp-server enable traps spanning-tree",
     "no snmp-server enable traps link",
     "no snmp-server enable traps port-security"]
